name: Cosmos

phase_0.boundary_condition: The ineffable garment and the veils of the aeons that enclose the restored Pleroma

VINIT.chosen_element: The Ineffable Father in the Silence of the First Deep
VINIT.justification: The void and silence before any emanation or aeon exists, the first source.

TANCH.justification: The terminal anchor that encloses the entire cosmological system, the ineffable Father who is the place of all places.

AFWD.chosen_element: The Emanation of the Creative Word
AFWD.justification: The forward morphism of the light-spark and the creative Word moving outward into the outer worlds.

AREV.justification: The reverse descent of the powers into the narrow and painful matter, the captivity of the light-spark.

CLINK.justification: The sequential composition of the twelve deeps and the generation of the holy Pleroma.

IMSCRIB.justification: The identity and self-reference of the First Father, the God-Man who maps the anatomy of the All to the macrocosm.

FSPLIT.justification: Splits the unified matter into the Land of Light and the Land of Death.

FFUSE.justification: Reconstitutes the scattered powers and the purity of matter back into the unified All.

EVALT.justification: The affirmative state of receiving the eternal crown, eternal life, and immortality.

EVALF.justification: The negative state of captivity, agitation, and the weeping of those who became poor.

ENGAGR.justification: The paradice of the Only-Begotten One hidden in the Setheus, simultaneously the excess of light and the cause of darkness.

IFIX.justification: The permanent, append-only record of the eternal crown, the ordinances, and the names written in the firmament.

phase_3.void_description: The Silence of the First Father, the characterless and patternless aeon before any emanation or form exists.
phase_3.true_description: The Land of Light, where the aeons receive the unfading crown, eternal rest, and the grace of the only-begotten one.
phase_3.false_description: The Land of Death, the agitation of matter, the captivity of the light-spark, and the weeping of those who lost their likeness.
phase_3.both_description: The Light-Darkness, the paradox of the Only-Begotten One who is hidden in the Setheus, containing both the infinite light and the characterless void simultaneously.

steps.domain_action: The Ineffable Father in the Silence of the First Deep
The Self-Begotten Place recognizing itself as the First Source
The chaining of the twelve deeps and the generation of the holy Pleroma
The forward emanation of the creative Word and the light-spark into the outer worlds
The Lord of Glory separating the unified matter into two distinct lands
The affirmative state of the Land of Light, receiving eternal life and immortality
The forward morphism of the aeons begetting worlds and heavens in the Land of Light
The permanent sealing of the ordinances and the eternal crown laid up in the imperishable aeon
The negative state of the Land of Death, where the light-spark is taken away and captivity occurs
The reverse descent of the powers into the narrow and painful matter
The protogenitor gathering the scattered powers and raising the purity of matter to reconstitute the All
The paradice of the Light-Darkness, the Only-Begotten One who is both hidden in the Setheus and revealed to the Pleroma
The composition of the God-Man, mapping the anatomy of the All to the macrocosm
The enveloping power dividing the existent from the non-existent
The affirmation of the eternal, placing veils and purifying powers for the existent
The permanent record of the all-perfect seal and the twelve adamantine stones
The negation of matter, calling it non-existent and placing it in the all-womb
The reverse descent of the forefather into the aeon of the mother to govern the hidden things
The unification of the All within the characterless ennead and the ineffable garment
The Father taking the whole likeness and making it into a city or a Man
The boundary of the All, the ineffable Father who encloses them all and is enclosed by none

phase_5.compiler_frontend: The creative Mind and the forethought that commands the All to work according to the ordinance of the hidden aeons
phase_5.ipc_mechanism: The broadcast of the creative Word, the shining of the crowns, and the songs of praise that mount above the rule
phase_5.memory_mechanism: The characterless ennead and the ineffable garment where all names, glories, and species are stored and known
phase_5.scheduler_mechanism: The will of the hidden Father and the forethought that determines the order of emanation and the establishment of the aeons
phase_5.alfs_store: The holy Pleroma and the twelve deeps, the canonical reference store from which all sources, mysteries, and gnoses have come

phase_6.cycle_cost: The agitation of the pleroma and the descent of the light-spark into the narrow and painful matter
phase_6.pre_cycle_state: The unified and still Pleroma resting in the ineffable and unutterable Father
phase_6.post_cycle_state: The established and bounded cosmos, where the All is divided into lands of life and death but ultimately gathered back into the ineffable garment
phase_6.delta_s_verdict: ΔS ≈ 0: The cycle of emanation and return is entropy-conservative because the scattered light-sparks are ultimately gathered and the All is restored to its original unified state within the ineffable garment.

lean_scaffold:
-- IGProtocol scaffold: VINIT → IMSCRIB → CLINK → AFWD → FSPLIT → EVALT → AFWD → IFIX → EVALF → AREV → FFUSE → ENGAGR → CLINK → FSPLIT → EVALT → IFIX → EVALF → AREV → FFUSE → IMSCRIB → TANCH
-- Class: Cosmos
-- Fingerprint: sig=(10,4,5,2)
--   self_ref=False | frobenius_order=3
--   dialetheia_complete=True | period=21
-- Expected tier: O₂
-- FSPLIT/FFUSE pairs: [(4, 10), (13, 18)]

import Imscribing.IGMorphism
import Imscribing.IGFunctor

namespace Imscribing
open Primitives Frobenius IGProtocol
open Dimensionality Topology Relational Polarity Grammar
     Fidelity KineticChar Granularity Criticality Protection Stoichiometry Chirality

-- ── Token → IG field mapping ──────────────────────────────────────────────
--   [0] VINIT     dim    := 𐑼               𐑼 → 𐑠  | initial object — ground of distinction
--   [1] IMSCRIB   gram   := 𐑠               𐑼 → 𐑱  | identity — self-imscription
--   [2] CLINK     fid    := 𐑱               𐑠 → 𐑾  | composition — regime coherence
--   [3] AFWD      rel    := 𐑾               𐑱 → 𐑚  | forward morphism — bidirectional arrow
--   [4] FSPLIT    gran   := 𐑚               𐑚 → 𐑚  | split δ — range decomposition
--   [5] EVALT     crit   := ⊙               𐑚 → 𐑙  | evaluate-true — criticality gate open
--   [6] AFWD      rel    := 𐑾               𐑚 → 𐑙  | forward morphism — bidirectional arrow
--   [7] IFIX      prot   := 𐑭               𐑚 → 𐑙  | irreversible fixation — winding number
--   [8] EVALF     chir   := 𐑖               𐑚 → 𐑙  | evaluate-false — chirality check
--   [9] AREV      pol    := 𐑗               𐑚 → 𐑙  | reverse morphism — parity flip
--   [10] FFUSE     stoi   := 𐑙               𐑙 → 𐑳  | fuse μ — assembly mode
--   [11] ENGAGR    stoi   := 𐑳               𐑙 → 𐑱  | engage paradox — B-state, both arms
--   [12] CLINK     fid    := 𐑱               𐑳 → 𐑚  | composition — regime coherence
--   [13] FSPLIT    gran   := 𐑚               𐑚 → 𐑚  | split δ — range decomposition
--   [14] EVALT     crit   := ⊙               𐑚 → 𐑙  | evaluate-true — criticality gate open
--   [15] IFIX      prot   := 𐑭               𐑚 → 𐑙  | irreversible fixation — winding number
--   [16] EVALF     chir   := 𐑖               𐑚 → 𐑙  | evaluate-false — chirality check
--   [17] AREV      pol    := 𐑗               𐑚 → 𐑙  | reverse morphism — parity flip
--   [18] FFUSE     stoi   := 𐑙               𐑙 → 𐑠  | fuse μ — assembly mode
--   [19] IMSCRIB   gram   := 𐑠               𐑙 → 𐑡  | identity — self-imscription
--   [20] TANCH     top    := 𐑡               𐑠 → 𐑼  | terminal object — connectivity boundary

-- ── Main IGProtocol term ────────────────────────────────────────────────────

noncomputable def cosmos_protocol : IGProtocol 𐑼 𐑡 :=
  .withGram 𐑠 <|
  -- Seq chain:
  (.arrow 𐑼 𐑼 𐑠)  -- [0] VINIT | dim := 𐑼 | initial object — ground of distinction (The Ineffable Father in the Silence of the First Deep)
  (.arrow 𐑠 𐑼 𐑱)  -- [1] IMSCRIB | gram := 𐑠 | identity — self-imscription (The Self-Begotten Place recognizing itself as the First Source)
  (.arrow 𐑱 𐑠 𐑾)  -- [2] CLINK | fid := 𐑱 | composition — regime coherence (The chaining of the twelve deeps and the generation of the holy Pleroma)
  (.arrow 𐑾 𐑱 𐑚)  -- [3] AFWD | rel := 𐑾 | forward morphism — bidirectional arrow (The forward emanation of the creative Word and the light-spark into the outer...)
  -- FSPLIT [4] (gran := 𐑚) (The Lord of Glory separating the unified matter into two distinct lands) / FFUSE [10] (stoi := 𐑙)
  .seq
    (.prod
      -- T-branch (3 nodes)
      .seq
        (.arrow ⊙ 𐑚 𐑙)  -- [5] EVALT | crit := ⊙ | evaluate-true — criticality gate open (The affirmative state of the Land of Light, receiving eternal life and immort...)
      .seq
        (.arrow 𐑾 𐑚 𐑙)  -- [6] AFWD | rel := 𐑾 | forward morphism — bidirectional arrow (The forward morphism of the aeons begetting worlds and heavens in the Land of...)
        (.arrow 𐑭 𐑚 𐑙)  -- [7] IFIX | prot := 𐑭 | irreversible fixation — winding number (The permanent sealing of the ordinances and the eternal crown laid up in the ...)
      -- F-branch (2 nodes)
      .seq
        (.arrow 𐑖 𐑚 𐑙)  -- [8] EVALF | chir := 𐑖 | evaluate-false — chirality check (The negative state of the Land of Death, where the light-spark is taken away ...)
        (.arrow 𐑗 𐑚 𐑙)  -- [9] AREV | pol := 𐑗 | reverse morphism — parity flip (The reverse descent of the powers into the narrow and painful matter))
    -- reconnect at FFUSE [10]: μ closes the Frobenius pair
    (.arrow 𐑙 𐑙 𐑳)  -- [10] FFUSE | stoi := 𐑙 (The protogenitor gathering the scattered powers and raising the purity of matter to reconstitute the All)
  (.arrow 𐑳 𐑙 𐑱)  -- [11] ENGAGR | stoi := 𐑳 | engage paradox — B-state, both arms (The paradice of the Light-Darkness, the Only-Begotten One who is both hidden ...)
  (.arrow 𐑱 𐑳 𐑚)  -- [12] CLINK | fid := 𐑱 | composition — regime coherence (The composition of the God-Man, mapping the anatomy of the All to the macrocosm)
  -- FSPLIT [13] (gran := 𐑚) (The enveloping power dividing the existent from the non-existent) / FFUSE [18] (stoi := 𐑙)
  .seq
    (.prod
      -- T-branch (2 nodes)
      .seq
        (.arrow ⊙ 𐑚 𐑙)  -- [14] EVALT | crit := ⊙ | evaluate-true — criticality gate open (The affirmation of the eternal, placing veils and purifying powers for the ex...)
        (.arrow 𐑭 𐑚 𐑙)  -- [15] IFIX | prot := 𐑭 | irreversible fixation — winding number (The permanent record of the all-perfect seal and the twelve adamantine stones)
      -- F-branch (2 nodes)
      .seq
        (.arrow 𐑖 𐑚 𐑙)  -- [16] EVALF | chir := 𐑖 | evaluate-false — chirality check (The negation of matter, calling it non-existent and placing it in the all-womb)
        (.arrow 𐑗 𐑚 𐑙)  -- [17] AREV | pol := 𐑗 | reverse morphism — parity flip (The reverse descent of the forefather into the aeon of the mother to govern t...))
    -- reconnect at FFUSE [18]: μ closes the Frobenius pair
    (.arrow 𐑙 𐑙 𐑠)  -- [18] FFUSE | stoi := 𐑙 (The unification of the All within the characterless ennead and the ineffable garment)
  (.arrow 𐑠 𐑙 𐑡)  -- [19] IMSCRIB | gram := 𐑠 | identity — self-imscription (The Father taking the whole likeness and making it into a city or a Man)
  (.arrow 𐑡 𐑠 𐑼)  -- [20] TANCH | top := 𐑡 | terminal object — connectivity boundary (The boundary of the All, the ineffable Father who encloses them all and is en...)

-- ── Evaluation arm sub-defs ─────────────────────────────────────────────────

-- truth arm
noncomputable def cosmos_true_arm : IGProtocol 𐑼 𐑡 :=
  (cosmos_protocol).restrictToEVALT

-- false arm
noncomputable def cosmos_false_arm : IGProtocol 𐑼 𐑡 :=
  (cosmos_protocol).restrictToEVALF

-- ── Verification theorems ───────────────────────────────────────────────────

theorem cosmos_tier : TierFunctor.obj 𐑼 = .O₂ := by decide

end Imscribing
